_comment_dataSource: Use 'mock' to test the alert pipeline immediately. Switch to 'live' and set liveBaseUrl to a PUBLIC NEPSE JSON source (sharesansar / merolagani / NEPSE proxy you trust).
_comment_livePaths: Endpoint paths under liveBaseUrl. chukul.com serves live prices (verified, no auth). It has no public IPO feed, so new-IPO alerts stay off until an IPO source is wired; price alerts work fully. The prices feed is required in live mode; the IPO feed is best-effort.
_comment_renotifyMinutes: While a price stays past its bound, re-remind every N minutes. Set 0 to alert only once per crossing.
_comment_priceWatch: Your REAL watchlist comes from the PRICE_WATCH env var (GitHub Secret in deploy, .env locally) so it stays private in a public repo. The entries below are only a non-sensitive example/fallback. Each entry can set a lower bound (below), an upper bound (above), or both.
_comment_telegram: Secrets are read from env vars TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN / TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID (see .env locally, GitHub Secrets in deploy). Leave these as placeholders — do NOT commit a real token here.
